MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-31-2021 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANTS' STIPULATED MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. YOSEF PERETZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. RACHEL CAPLER, ESQ. AND ANDREW LIVINGSTON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/6/21 IS CONTINUED TO 3/7/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANTS TO PAY $60.00 VIA E-FILING FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANTS WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 3/7/22 TRIAL DATE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL. MS. CAPLER TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
